title: Paladin's Furniture Mod
description: A Modern Furniture mod for Minecraft where things are functional!
body:
![Paladin's Furniture Mod Banner](https://github.com/UnlikePaladin/paladins-furniture/raw/architectury-1.17.1/docs/banner.png?raw=true)
A Brand-New Furniture mod for Modern Minecraft where things are functional! It contains over 1,000 New Pieces of Furniture that you can use to furnish your build, while being functional and nice to look at. Everything is craftable and obtainable in Survival so it's friendly, and nice to look at, it has compatibility with Sandwichable, REI, JEI, EMI, Patchouli, CookingForBlockHeads, Farmer's Delight and features modded wood type support. The mod has been in development for roughly 2 years but I don't plan on stopping with new updates, adding new furniture and mod compat with other mods!

The mod is on Fabric/Quilt, on MinecraftForge as of Release 1.1, and on NeoForge as of Release 1.2.1. I've got a  [Discord](https://discord.gg/zbMDUPB) where you can get support or ask questions but please report any issues on the [Github Issues Page](https://github.com/UnlikePaladin/paladins-furniture/issues).

Cloth Config is only needed on releases older than 1.2, Indium is required if Sodium is present.
I also recommend installing [Patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli/), as it will introduce a Guide Book that will familiarize you with the Furniture's Recipes and how you can use it.

![Image of a Kitchen](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/unlikepaladin/PFM-Resources@main/images/2022-05-21_03.01.30.png)

![Image of a Table](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/unlikepaladin/PFM-Resources@main/images/2021-11-17_22.15.51.png)

All the Furniture has to be crafted from the Wood Working Table, use a Recipe Viewer like REI, JEI, EMI, or the Patchouli Book to check the recipes, I recommend you use the mod with both for the best experience. 
![Image of a Wood Working Table](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/unlikepaladin/PFM-Resources@main/images/2022-05-17_23.35.26.png)

![Image of a bathroom](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/unlikepaladin/PFM-Resources@main/images/2023-03-29_11.57.34.png)

![Image of a bedroom](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/unlikepaladin/PFM-Resources@main/images/2023-08-14_15.36.41.png)

### I can't wait to see what you create, Happy Decorating!
